name: Quick Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, cook onion and garlic in margarine until tender.
2. Add the remaining ingredients; bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 15 to 20 minutes.
4. Use as basting sauce for pork, chicken, or beef.
5. Refrigerate leftovers.
MICROWAVE:
1. In a 1-quart glass measure, microwave margarine on full power (high) for 30 to 45 seconds, or until melted.
2. Add onion and garlic; microwave on full power (high) for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes, or until tender.
3. Add the remaining ingredients; cover with waxed paper.
4. Microwave on full power (high) for 3 to 5 minutes, or until the mixture boils.
5. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 4 to 5 minutes on medium-high power to blend flavors.
6. Proceed as above.
